detail: API Error: Stream idle timeout - partial response received
intent: What open transformer model from 2025 or later would literally run the fastest generating strings of length 200 at huge scale with beam search and a huge number of beams on this computer? I realized that generating beams, then weighting them using temperature is our *correct ground truth* for the thing we are trying to target with our adjustment to the temperature during autoregressive sampling.
name: model inference performance analysis
